result.stdout:
JonTurk CLI v1.1.0
  A command line tool that allows you to save, list and run the frequently used CLI commands.

USAGE
  jonturk [options]
  jonturk [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  list              Lists the saved commands. 
  remove            Removes the specified command from the saved commands. 
  run               Runs the specified command. 
  save              Saves the related command with the name. 

You can run `jonturk [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

You can run `jonturk [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
JonTurk CLI v1.1.0
  A command line tool that allows you to save, list and run the frequently used CLI commands.

USAGE
  jonturk remove --name <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Removes the specified command from the saved commands.

OPTIONS
* -n|--name         Name of the command 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
JonTurk CLI v1.1.0
  A command line tool that allows you to save, list and run the frequently used CLI commands.

USAGE
  jonturk run --name <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Runs the specified command.

OPTIONS
* -n|--name         Name of the command 
  -p|--path         Working directory where the command will be run. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  -p|--path         Working directory where the command will be run. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
JonTurk CLI v1.1.0
  A command line tool that allows you to save, list and run the frequently used CLI commands.

USAGE
  jonturk save --name <value> --command <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Saves the related command with the name.

OPTIONS
* -n|--name         Name of the command 
* -c|--command      Command (with arguments) 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

DESCRIPTION

OPTIONS
* -n|--name         Name of the command 
* -c|--command      Command (with arguments) 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
